titleStmt.title: SII 38.309: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 309. (A.R. No. 309 of 1912.) KŪRMĀYI, PALAMNER TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Varadarāja Perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Kampaṇṇa-uḍaiyār Year: Kaliyaga 4452 mistake for 4462, Śaka 1283 A.D. Plava, Puraṭṭādi, Kaṉṉi, śu. di. 7. Tuesday, Mūlam = Tuesday 7th September 1361 A.D. However, the week was Thursday not Tuesday.

summary.p: It records the assignment of tolls on salt, sesame, copper, sarees, sandal, arecanuts and other items by the customs official Meydēvar, for providing a garland also for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Edirkoṇḍa-perumāḷ at Kuṟumā in Pulināḍu, who assigned these under the orders of the treasury official Viṭṭappa Aiyyaṉ, a mahāprādhāṉi of the palace. It is also recorded that tolls on the above said commodities were to be collected if the (each item) exceed more than ten bags.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaliyuka varuṣam 1000 4 100 5 10 2kkuc ceṉṟa Āṇṭu
1000 2 100 8 10 3kku mel cellā niṉṟa Āṇṭu plavavaruṣattu puraṭṭāti mātam kaṉ
ṉināyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum cevvāykkiḻamai peṟṟa
mulattu śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭaleśvara Arirāyavipāṭa pācaikku
ttappuvarāyar kaṇṭa śrīvirarpukkaṇṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar kampaṇṇa
uṭaiyavar Araimaṉaiyil makāpiṟatāṉi comappauṭaiyavar
paṇṭāri viṭṭappa Aiyyaṉ nirupappaṭikku cuṅka Atikāri meytevar puli
nāṭṭu kuṟumāviyil perumāḷ Etirkoṇṭaperumāḷukkut tirumalai
tirunantā viḷakku viṭṭa māṉiyam mel vaṭṭai kiḻ vaṭṭaiyil varum
Ubhayamārggattil varum vakai Oṉṟukku poti pattukku mel Uppu
ppoti Eḷpoti ceppupuṭavai malavai paruttippoti pacumpai talaiccu
mai mārappu pākku �ti miḷaku potu kayattuṟai palacarakkum cantaṉa
m kaṟpūram cāntu vira ṇiyam Uṭpaṭṭa pala carakkum cuṅkan tarāta mutalilaiyu
m makaṇmaikaḷ tira ttilum vakaikkoru potiviṭak kaṭavatākavum kutirai
yuṭpaṭa pūrva ttilum Immariyāti candrādittavaraiyilum Ip
perumāḷukkuc cellakkaṭavatu Itukku A keṅkaikaraiyil tā
y tantai kurāṟpacuvaikkoṉṟāṉ pāpattile pokakaṭavaṉ vāraṇa(vā)siyil
mmi koṉṟāṉ pāpattepaṭuvāṉ Inta mariyāti kalliluñ cempilu
lum veṭṭikkoḷvatu .
Digital edition of SII 38.309 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
